Framework
Framework

Three things we will do with AI

01

Sell AI

Bring AI capability to market. Build a revenue line directly from our expertise.

  • Forward-deployed AI resources in client engagements
  • Industry-specific use cases that convert to revenue
  • AI Governance
  • AI Strategy
  • AI Data Transformation
02

Create Revenue

Use AI to create new, differentiated value for clients that competitors cannot match.

  • Redesign offerings around client future-state needs
  • Subscriptions, managed services, outcome-based pricing
  • Do what competitors cannot do at scale
03

Improve

Use AI to make our delivery faster, more precise, and more scalable.

  • Decompose and accelerate core delivery processes
  • Build reusable accelerators that improve margin
  • 20–30% efficiency gain per offering

Pillar 02
Pillar 2 · Improve

Use AI to make our
own delivery better

THE PROCESS
  • Decompose core delivery: IA, System Implementation, Review Services, Data Governance
  • Identify steps where AI reduces time, increases precision, or expands coverage
  • Apply Build vs. Buy discipline with a clear evaluation framework
  • Develop reusable accelerators: prompts, templates, automation scripts
  • Set measurable improvement targets per offering
20–30%

Cost reduction
per offering

per person

expansion

  • AI Champions — one per competency center
  • Training & Enablement — role-based skills
  • Competency Center — shared tool library
  • Governance — model and prompt standards
Pillar 03
Pillar 03 · Create Value

Transform how we serve clients

Clients don’t buy AI. They buy lower risk, faster growth, reduced cost, and better decisions.

↓ Lower risk

Continuous

Continuous monitoring vs. periodic sampling

↑ Faster growth

Predictive

Predictive recommendations vs. static analysis

↓ Reduced cost

Lower delivery cost

At the same price point

◆ Better decisions

Weekly, not quarterly

Insights delivered on a continuous cadence

◆ Competitive edge

100% coverage

Analyze 100% of transactions — not just samples

1

Understand their needs in an AI-forward world

2

Map the future of our client’s business and accompanying transformation

3

Evaluate our current offerings to align with the future client JTBD

4

Expand offerings for the transition (1–5 years) and the future state (5+ years)

Case Study
Case Study

What Good Looks Like

Organizations are moving toward continuous monitoring, continuous auditing, and full population testing.

DISCOVER & PLAN
01

Crowe conducts an AI workshop to educate and enable clients who have recently adopted a new large language model

▸
02

Crowe conducts an AI value lab to decompose internal audit processes and identify pain points and opportunities

▸
03

Crowe provides a detailed AI and advanced technology roadmap outlining what can be done now, next, and later

BUILD & SCALE
04

Clients select priority opportunities and engage Crowe to help define a path toward continuous monitoring and auditing

▸
05

Crowe deploys engineering resources to build advanced tooling that drives efficiency in the near term

▸
06

Crowe and client co-develop a roadmap to achieve continuous monitoring and continuous auditing

▸
07

To be determined

Operating Model
How We Activate

The operating model:
start now, build toward

START NOW — FOUR IMMEDIATE PRIORITIES
PriorityAction
Organize for scaleAlign AI Champions; integrate with Studio and TBT
Focus on what mattersConfirm top 3–5 growth platforms for AI investment
Activate market intelApply AI to CRM, pursuit activity, and proposals
Operationalize excellenceDecompose processes; build scalable use cases
BUILD TOWARD — FOUR STRATEGIC ENABLERS
EnablerWhy it matters
Align AI to platforms70%+ of investment tied to named growth areas — focus beats breadth
Establish an AI benchPrompt libraries, copilots, accelerators — reuse drives margin
Shift the talent modelFewer pure analysts; more AI-augmented hybrid roles
Outcome-based pricingFixed-fee, value-based, shared-savings models — this is where we capture value

The Playbook

How we execute the strategy

Playbook
Playbook

AI Strategy Execution Framework

Crowe Consulting executes its AI strategy through three coordinated areas of focus

1

Sell AI Strategy, Transformation & Implementation Services

New Revenue Engine — position Crowe as the go-to AI transformation partner for clients

VIEW DETAILS →
2

Create New Client Value Through AI-Enabled Offerings

Differentiation + Growth — redesign how we serve clients around their AI-forward future state

VIEW DETAILS →
3

Incrementally Improve Existing Offerings

Efficiency + Margin Expansion — make what we do today faster, cheaper, and more scalable

VIEW DETAILS →
MINIMUM EXECUTION STANDARD

Each business line, per quarter:

  • Identify 5–10 AI opportunities
  • Launch 2+ AI pilots
  • Advance 1 offering transformation initiative
  • Generate 3+ AI client engagements or conversations

Click on each step of the framework to learn more

Playbook
Playbook

Incremental Improvement of Existing Offerings

Increase delivery efficiency, expand margins, improve pricing flexibility, and free capacity to create new client value

1

Decompose Offerings into Jobs-to-Be-Done

  • Planning / scoping
  • Testing execution
  • UAT development
  • Data collection
  • Reporting / docs
  • Project management
  • Risk assessment
  • Client communication
  • Quality review
Output → AI Opportunity Map
2

Identify AI Efficiency Opportunities

Evaluate each component:
  • Can AI reduce manual effort?
  • Can AI improve quality / consistency?
  • Can AI increase speed?
  • Can AI expand scope coverage?
3

Select Development Path

No-code / Low-code
  • Built within business lines
  • Supported by TBT group
  • Rapid pilots (<60 days)
Pro-code (AI Studio Required)
  • Scalable, repeatable solutions
  • Formal funding required
  • Added to accelerator roadmap
4

Monetization & Margin Strategy

Option A — Capture Margin
  • Maintain pricing
  • Increase profitability
  • Fund AI investments
Option B — Price Flexibility
  • Adjust pricing to stay competitive
  • Defend market share
Option C — Reinvest Capacity Preferred
  • Expand engagement scope
  • Deliver proactive insights
  • Increase client interaction
  • Create follow-on work
Playbook
Playbook

Create New Client Value Through AI

Ensure offerings remain relevant as client operating models become AI-driven

1

Client Future-State Assessment

Assess:
  • AI-driven changes to client operations
  • Regulatory evolution
  • Risk, compliance, finance transformation
  • Future jobs-to-be-done (3–5 years)
Executive roundtables AI value labs Client listening tours Market trend synthesis
2

Gap Analysis

  • Annual audit → Continuous assurance
  • Sample testing → Full-population monitoring
  • Static reporting → Real-time insights
  • Reactive compliance → Predictive risk management
3

Redesign / Build Offerings

  • Enhance existing offerings
  • Bundle into AI-enabled managed services
  • Launch new solution categories
Low-code innovation pods

Business-led

Pro-code accelerators

AI Studio-led

4

Market Validation Loop

Hypothesize→ Test→ Refine→ Pilot→ Scale
Each business line must produce:
  • Future-State POV (3–5 years)
  • Top 3 offering transformations
  • At least 1 pilot per transformation

Build, Scale & Monetize AI Transformation Services

Land

Expand

Scale

  • Pre-built models

  • Monitoring dashboards

Operating Model & Governance

DECISION RIGHTS
1

Business Lines Own

  • Use-case identification
  • Client relevance
  • Commercialization
  • Accelerator development
2

AI Studio Owns

  • Scalable builds
  • Technical standards
3

Joint Ownership

  • Pro-code prioritization
  • Investment decisions

Success Metrics

  • AI revenue ($)
  • AI-influenced margin improvement (%)
  • Number of scaled AI solutions
  • Pipeline velocity (idea → production)
  • Client adoption of AI-enabled offerings

Crowe AI Value Narrative

Each business line must clearly articulate:

  • How AI is transforming the client’s world
  • How Crowe offerings evolve in response
  • Why Crowe is differentiated in delivering this value
